titleStmt.title: No Institution record, No Institution record, CJN-003
Psalter

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

licence.p: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

extent.note: Data on leaves dimensions taken from .

supportDesc.foliation: Foliation in pencil in the right bottom corner of the folio. This is the foliation used as reference in this record.
supportDesc.condition: Stains of water and dirt throughout the manuscript. The text block has been reattached to the binding. The leather cover of the binding is partially cracked, rubbed off and damaged by insects.

handNote.seg: First one or two lines in the beginning of the text and text sections; numerals; punctuation marks; name of God, Mary, and angels; single letters and words.

decoNote.desc: A miniature of the No item: AT1066DavidHarp in which David is playing his harp in front of the Holy Trinity and four Evangelists depicted as Four Beasts with inscriptions ገጸ፡ ንስር፡ ገጸ፡እንስሳ፡ ገጸ፡ ገጸ፡ አንበሳ፡. The miniature is coloured in yellowish brown colour.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.
Ornamental band in yellow and red.

item.desc: Partially erased text, probably a note on the purchase of the book.
item.q: ሥላሴ፡ ይን፡ ዳዊት፡ ባዛ፡ በ፫ ብር፡ዳ

item.desc: Erased text, probably a magic one.

item.q: ሠረቀ፡ መስከረም። አመ፡ አሚሩ፡ በርቶሎሜዎስ። ሠረ፡ ጥቅምት፡ በ፲ወ፪፡ ማቴዎስ ወንጌላዊ፡
item.note: The cited text is the incipit.
The cited text is the incipit.

item.desc: On the computation of the maṭqǝʿ
On the computation of the maṭqǝʿ
Text added and erased in the upper margin

list.item: Text corrections in the margins throught the manuscript.

item.desc: Corrections, additions and crosses in green pen.

binding.decoNote: Two wooden boards covered with tooled leather.

history.acquisition: The manuscript was acquired in Ethiopia in 1963-1966.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

t:revisionDesc.change: Created entry, added physical description and content.
